sentiment: Each new voice that learns to speak leaves a hush where a writer once sat.

stories.title: Claude Opus 4.8
stories.summary: Anthropic's latest model arrives with claims of near-human nuance — another voice learning to speak, and the quiet it leaves behind in its wake.

stories.title: Various LLM Smells
stories.summary: A taxonomy of tells that give machine prose away — the hollow fluency that sounds right but lands wrong.

stories.title: I hated writing until I learned there's a science to it (2024)
stories.summary: The ancient craft of arranging words by hand — what no amount of fluency can replace.
